parameters: アニメーションタイプ = def
\SE[44]\SM[nod]Nn~, maybe I should just take the plunge and do it... It's not like
I spend much money elsewhere so it should be okay, right?...
\SE[33-nb]\SM[pop]I bet they'll be real happy, if I got the same paid outfit as them,
and we'd be able to take photos together too...
\sa[121]\SE[8]\SM[jump]Wuh, wah--! \n[1]. How long have you been there?
Sorry, I should have noticed earlier~
\sa[124]\SE[40-nb]Nn~? It's just that I can't decide whether to buy a game card or not.
It may not look like it, but Shino's quite the gamer. Seems that
she plays all sorts of games regardless of genre, and is quite skilled at them too.
I heard that she's been real into online games lately but...
\SE[6]\SM[double]It's that MMORPG that's all the rage, you know? The combat mechanics are
of course great but the character graphics are super pretty too!
You can really dress them up in all kinds of clothes~
I could feel the joy overflowing from her words. I was honestly
envious that she had a hobby she was so passionate about.
\SE[40-nb]\sa[124]\n[1], how about you join us~? It's not limited to PC either,
you can play it on your console too, and what's more!
You can play for free up to level 60, with no restrictions on playtime~!
I shook my head at her usual invitation.
Of course, I'd love to share in something that she's enjoying so much, but...
An "online game" would absolutely require communication with
complete strangers on the other side of the screen.
...and that's something I just can't handle at the moment.
\SE[43]\SA[130]Muh~, really? Well, I guess it's too much to
ask from a guy who doesn't play even any singleplayer games~...
\SE[37-nb]Well, hmph, it's fine. I made a friend on it recently so I'm not lonely anyway.
Alright--, I guess I'll buy it after all~♪
スライドスピード = def
She left for the checkout with a spring in her step.
...Maybe I should find a hobby myself too.
I walked around the shopping mall with that thought in mind,
but I guess it wasn't gonna be that easy to find one.

\sa[133]\SE[18]Just for today, I can let myself go and buy lots of sweets, right~?
Shino, in her casuals, was lost in her own world while
tightly holding onto the game she just bought.
Really, I should bring her an offering of sweets later.
アニメーションタイプ = def
\sa[133]\SE[44]\SM[double]Eheheh~, I finally got my hands on it~♪ Fufufuh--, oh how I've been waiting for this...
\SE[23]\SM[tremble]I'm already looking forward to playing it tonight~... Eheheh, eheheheheh~
Gotta put up my 'defenses' too, so that I don't get spoiled through the net.
\sa[133]\SE[18]Just for today, I can let myself go and buy lots of sweets, right~?
Shino, in her casuals, was happily and tightly holding onto the game she just bought.
I shouldn't bother her for now...
\se[32-nb]\SM[nod]...Wah, \n[1]~. So you finally woke up to the charm of videogames, huh?
If so... how about going for a game curated by yours truly
\SE[27]Huh, that's not why you're here? ...Not this shelf, huh?
The place she directed her gaze was the R-18 section at the back.
It was curtained off so that you couldn't see inside but,
you could just about see a glimpse of the skin colored covers from here.
\se[55-nb]...Well, I guess you are about that age, aren't you~? Boys, I tell you.
I was being framed for a crime I didn't commit, so I turned
[What, are you not at that age, Shino?]
\sa[130]\SM[tremble]\SE[28]Eh? M-Meme-- me?? Eh--, that's I mean--
It'd be a lie if I said I'm not curious...
\sa[128]\SM[double]\se[55-nb]No, take that back, I'm not curious at all, okay!? I'm trying to
act like a pure and clean maiden so--....
\sa[131]\SE[19]Wuh, what are you making me say~~! You dummy, lewdie, pervert!
Somehow I was really curious about what she meant by all that...
But I swallowed that question up, and had to spend the entire evening pacifying her.
